texto: Growing up, I didn't get the talk of 'Make sure boys take you on a date and treat you right.' So I was the girl who wasn't dating and would just text. I dated these guys who didn't have jobs, and I would always be paying. At one point, I remember looking in the mirror and thinking, 'You're too pretty and cool to be treated like this.'
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Meghan Trainor: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Growing up, I didn't get the talk of 'Make sure boys take you on a date and treat you right.' So …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, girl, dating pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dating e mirror.
